name: People.ai Revenue Intelligence API
what_it_does: AI-powered revenue intelligence platform with REST API — automatically capturing all sales activity from email, calendar, and calls to CRM without manual entry, mapping buying committee contacts to opportunities, providing deal health scores, and delivering pipeline analytics and forecasting for enterprise revenue teams.
use_cases: Querying deal health scores and buying committee engagement for pipeline reviews
Pulling automatic activity capture data for CRM completeness audits
Integrating People.ai insights with Salesforce for opportunity stage recommendations
Monitoring rep activity metrics and quota coverage for sales manager dashboards
Automating pipeline risk alerts based on engagement score drops
not_for: Sales outreach and sequencing (use Salesloft or Outreach for execution)
Small teams without enterprise CRM investment
best_when: An enterprise revenue operations team using Salesforce or Microsoft Dynamics wants AI-driven activity capture, buying committee intelligence, and pipeline analytics to improve forecast accuracy and reduce CRM data entry burden.
avoid_when: You're a small team, don't use Salesforce/Dynamics, need outbound sequencing, or want marketing attribution rather than pipeline health.

auth.notes: OAuth2 with bearer token. Organization-scoped access with role-based permissions. Webhook for deal health changes and activity events. Salesforce OAuth required for CRM sync. Email (Gmail/Outlook) OAuth for activity capture. Complex multi-OAuth enterprise integration pattern.

pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2016. Raised $100M+ including Series C led by Andreessen Horowitz. ICONIQ and Akkadian Ventures investors. Named 'People.ai' to reflect focus on rep-level behavioral analytics. Buying committee mapping unique differentiator. Automatic activity capture covers 100% of sales interactions. Strong in Fortune 500 sales organizations.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for deals, activities, accounts, reps, and pipeline analytics. OAuth2 bearer token. Limited public documentation — enterprise integration partner focus. Buying committee contact mapping requires Salesforce opportunity linkage. Activity capture has 24-48 hour processing latency.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Deal reads fully idempotent. Activity reads idempotent. Account reads idempotent. Rep performance reads idempotent by period.
known_agent_gotchas: Salesforce required — no CRM agnostic support
Activity capture has 24-48 hour latency — not real-time
Complex multi-OAuth: Salesforce + Email (Gmail/Outlook) + People.ai required
Buying committee mapping requires Salesforce opportunity contacts configured
Enterprise pricing ($80-120/user) — significant cost, verify budget before integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001 compliant. US and EU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Email content access is highly privileged — buying committee analysis reads email metadata. Multi-OAuth token management requires secure credential storage. Enterprise procurement process validates security posture.
